metaTags.metaDescription: Streamline how you build, deploy, and deliver privacy-preserving products by partnering with Cloudflare

relatedBlades.title: Build on Cloudflare's privacy platform
relatedBlades.subtitle: Streamline how you build, deploy, and deliver privacy-preserving products by partnering with Cloudflare
relatedBlades.copy: Web applications and advertisers increasingly collect personally identifiable information (PII) to enhance digital experiences. Using IP addresses as an identifier however raises privacy concerns. Cloudflare's unified platform empowers developers to build privacy into application architecture — and helps increase consumer confidence, reduce the risk from possible breaches, and meet stricter global regulations.

relatedBlades.title: Cloudflare is a leader in privacy on the internet

columnContent.title: Credibility in delivering with industry leaders
columnContent.description: Cloudflare's privacy platform is implemented by some of the world's largest consumer technology companies.

columnContent.title: Co-develop with Cloudflare engineering
columnContent.description: Cloudflare's privacy engineering team brings deep expertise with cryptography and Internet standards so you can focus on your product innovation while we handle the evolving complexities of privacy requirements.

columnContent.title: Scale globally with performance and reliability
columnContent.description: Cloudflare's Privacy platform is deployed on Cloudflare's distributed infrastructure with global coverage. Your users have a fast, consistent and secure experience no matter how they access your application.

relatedBlades.heading: How Cloudflare helps applications with privacy

content.value: Protect end-user PII —including client metadata and IP addresses — from third-party trackers
Privacy Proxy: A proxy that offers the protection of a VPN, built natively into application architecture
Privacy Gateway: A lightweight proxy that encrypts request data for APIs and telemetry, and forwards it through an IP-blinding relay
Independent auditability of public key infrastructure to confirm integrity.
Code Verify: Verification of code delivery and authenticity for web applications.
Key Transparency: Third-party verification to public key infrastructure to avoid blindly trusting the service provider.
Collect and analyze user data across two parties in a manner that doesn't breach user trust.
Cooperative Analytics: Aggregate across collection of PII-stripped data for analytics, using the Distributed Aggregation Protocol (DAP) standard.

cards.title: Private browsing
cards.description: Protect users' IP address and browsing activity from network services and website owners to provide a private Internet experience without the need to set up a VPN.

cards.title: In-app anonymous mode
cards.description: Provide users added protection and assurance when engaging with sensitive personal content such as health, finances, and social interactions.

cards.title: Key transparency in messaging
cards.description: Fulfill end-to-end-encryption and avoid the risk of on-path attacks, by verifying the integrity of public key infrastructure.

cards.title: Privacy preserving measurement
cards.description: Innovative protocol implemented across two parties to collect data at the application layer for analytics, which prevents either party from accessing data individually.

cards.title: AI cloud services
cards.description: When serving user requests with third-party AI services, provide an added layer of protection that hides the source of the request to protect against tracking.

cards.title: Private access tokens
cards.description: Authenticate HTTP traffic to avoid having to collect additional personal information at the device level.

features.title: Microsoft
features.description: Cloudflare enables privacy in Microsoft Edge Secure Network VPN

features.title: Flo Health
features.description: Flo 'Anonymous Mode' offers advancement in the Privacy and Security of Reproductive Health Data

relatedBlades.title: Cloudflare helps enable a more private Internet for consumers

columnContent.description: Fast and Free Public DNS resolver that doesn't sell or share user data.

columnContent.title: WARP
columnContent.description: Securely and privately routes Internet traffic from the device to Cloudflare's global network

columnContent.title: Turnstile
columnContent.description: CAPTCHA alternative that validates real users without collecting or sharing user data

columnContent.title: Speed Test
columnContent.description: Ad-free, tracking-free speed tests with minimal data collection, and no PII

features.title: Private by design: building with Cloudflare's privacy platform
features.description: Learn about Cloudflare's unique approach to supporting privacy from the network level
